other_observers: Gene Rutherford and Duane Nelson on 5/6.  Kara Carragher saw it on 5/9 and John Drummond and Jeannie Mitchell saw it on 5/11.
description: I was birding with Gene Rutherford at Hasty Campground, when I noticed a small warbler in the upper parts of the Cottonwood trees.  I quickly identifed the bird as a Cape May Warbler, do to the bold streaking on the breast, yellow color in the face.  See my photos.
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival, Brandon K. Percival
